title: resolve_client_id doc exposes Cow impl detail
description: The doc comment on resolve_client_id (methods/mod.rs) explains what Cow variant is returned ('Returns Cow::Borrowed(s) when ... Cow::Owned(ulid) when ...'). This is implementation detail, not a usage contract. The thing a caller needs to know is: 'Returns the supplied string unchanged, or a freshly generated ULID when None.' Replace the Cow description with the caller-facing contract. The return type already communicates the borrow split to anyone reading the signature.
